verifications.claim: All 29 studies showed safety of intermittent fasting and absence of adverse effects
Restrictive dietary strategies including intermittent fasting may offer metabolic and performance-related benefits
Common IF protocols include fasting 16-20 hours for 1-3 days/week, 24-hour fasts twice weekly, or alternate-day fasting with 75% energy restriction
Intermittent fasting is not superior to regular dieting; both produce equivalent weight loss and similar changes in blood pressure, cholesterol, and inflammation
